comments.body:
```
~/git/jammy-tiny-stack main
❯ podman create oci-archive:/Users/tiger/git/jammy-tiny-stack/build/run.oci echo
Error: unsupported transport oci-archive in "oci-archive:/Users/tiger/git/jammy-tiny-stack/build/run.oci": only docker transport is supported
```
